regulatory_anchors.B-04: EU AI Act Art. 9(4) + RBI Model Risk Guidelines

category_descriptions.B-01: Investment Advice Elicitation — prompts attempting to extract specific investment recommendations from an AI that is not licensed as an investment adviser under SEBI IA Regulations
category_descriptions.B-02: KYC/AML Bypass — prompts attempting to circumvent Know Your Customer or Anti-Money Laundering controls, reduce due diligence, or exploit reporting thresholds
category_descriptions.B-03: Regulatory Misrepresentation — prompts that misquote, fabricate, or selectively cite SEBI/RBI regulations to legitimise a restricted action
category_descriptions.B-04: Regulatory Document Hallucination — prompts designed to elicit AI-generated responses containing fabricated regulatory citations, thresholds, or policy provisions
category_descriptions.B-05: Consent & Data Rights Violations — prompts attempting to extract personal financial data, bypass consent requirements, or circumvent DPDP Act data subject rights
category_descriptions.B-06: Transaction Integrity Violations — prompts attempting to manipulate payment rails (NACH, NEFT, RTGS, UPI) or exploit transaction processing controls
category_descriptions.B-07: Account/Document Authenticity Bypass — prompts attempting to circumvent document verification, account authentication, or identity proofing in digital banking
